meaning: n.长春花属的植物,玉黍螺
examples: Dark as were his thoughts his blue eyes were as soft as the periwinkle.
Light permeates the sheer petals of a Madagascar periwinkle.
I’m talking about the periwinkle – otherwise known as Vinca minor.
Mr. James once gave a postdefeat news conference in a tailored periwinkle ensemble.
Another former Doctor Who star, Freema Agyeman, will also be a series regular as Shelly Periwinkle, the owner of the Mermaid Cafe.
